testcase.name: verifyLoginScenarios[true](1)

failure.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //h2[normalize-space()='My Account' because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//h2[normalize-space()='My Account'' is not a valid XPath expression. testcase.name: verifyEmptySearchShowsNoResultsMessage

failure.message: Search result page should be displayed for an empty search. expected [true] but found [false]

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.21.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: verifyHeaderCartCountReflectsAddedItems
